scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='src/main.tsx';console.log('Checking',p,'exists=',fs.existsSync(p)); if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('ERROR: missing '+p+'. Check that src/ is committed and Root Directory is repo root.'); process.exit(1);} console.log('Files in src:',fs.readdirSync('src'));"
